purchase_order.duplicate_number: A purchase order with this number already exists
purchase_order.not_editable: Only DRAFT or ORDERED orders can be edited
purchase_order.not_draft: This action is only allowed on DRAFT orders
purchase_order.not_receivable: Only ORDERED or PARTIALLY_RECEIVED orders can be received
purchase_order.not_cancellable: Cannot cancel a received or already cancelled order
purchase_order.item_duplicate: This inventory item is already on this order
